criteria.name: derive_macro_location
criteria.description: Correctly identifies that the derive macro is implemented in a separate proc-macro crate at impl/src/lib.rs with #[proc_macro_derive(Error, attributes(backtrace, error, from, source))].
criteria.groundTruth: The derive macro is defined in thiserror-impl crate (impl/src/lib.rs) as #[proc_macro_derive(Error, attributes(backtrace, error, from, source))]

criteria.name: from_attribute
criteria.description: Explains that #[from] generates a From impl for the variant and implies #[source] for the same field.
criteria.groundTruth: #[from] generates a From<SourceType> impl for the variant and automatically implies #[source] on the same field

criteria.name: source_attribute
criteria.description: Explains that #[source] marks a field as the error source for Error::source(), or a field named 'source' is auto-detected.
criteria.groundTruth: #[source] marks a field as the source for Error::source() method. A field named 'source' is automatically detected without needing the attribute.

criteria.name: additional_attributes
criteria.description: Mentions #[backtrace] for backtrace forwarding, #[error(...)] for Display formatting, and #[transparent] for delegating to the source.
criteria.groundTruth: #[backtrace] enables backtrace forwarding through provide(), #[error("...")] formats the Display impl with field interpolation, #[transparent] delegates Display and source to the inner error
